title: MCS Blocks (X)
body:
[No longer supports updates!]
===
Main Information
===

* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters):
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings.
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file.
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true.

* Creator and Developer: [​MC Silver]

* Minecraft Version: 1.19.4  
Available Latest Version: v1.3   
Tested on: Vanilla & Spigot/Paper servers.  
[​You can suggest new gamerules and features on my discord server]

Gamerules
=== 
- You can modify gamerules using /trigger command, if you have operator commands.   
 Operator commands: /function mcs_weather:permissions/op.   
 /trigger "gamerule_name" set (0 or 1) (0 - False, 1 - True)  

  Gamerules (All gamerules are true by default)

  List of gamerules:  
  1.﻿ mcs_fixes..disable.slab.x.ray  
  2. mcs_fixes..allow.nether.void.damage  
  3. mcs_fixes..allow.mobs.jump.over.rails  
  4. mcs_fixes..allow.mobs.destroy.transport  
  5. mcs_fixes..allow.boat.falling.damage  

Features
===
1. Slab X-Ray fix, you will get blindness and damage.
2. Infinite carpet fix. (You have to mine carpets with shears)
3. Nether roof void damage. (128 block higher in nether you will take 4 damage per second).
4. Mobs jump over the rails.
5. Aggressive mobs can destroy boats and minecart, if they are targeted at entity. (They can't destroy minecart, if it moves)
6. Boats and Minecarts destroy when they fall from more than 24 blocks height, transport destroyed by a fall from a height now deal damage around them. Boats deal 7 and Minecarts 11 damage.

Uninstall
===
1. /function mcs_fixes:uninstall/datapack

2. ![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1081919421624365076/1081921993890349096/2023-03-05_16.48.54.png)

3. ![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1081919421624365076/1081922919694864505/2023-03-05_16.52.23.png)

Compatibility
===
* This datapack should be compatible with almost all packs!  
* For datapack developers! If you want ignore my custom mobs you have to add this (tag=!mcs_mob) or (tag=!smithed.entity) or (tag=!global.ignore) in your code  
* Also contact with me on discord about compatibility!
